name: io.github.privacyplaybook/sops-mcp
description: MCP server for creating and managing SOPS-encrypted secrets

environmentVariables.name: SOPS_MCP_AGE_PUBLIC_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Age recipient public key. Required at startup.

environmentVariables.name: SOPS_AGE_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Age private key. Required at call time for any mutation tool (decrypt + re-encrypt). Read-only tools do not need it.
